item.title: Midcap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap 150 Declines 1.95%
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a notable downturn on 30 Mar 2026, declining by 1.95%. This broad-based weakness was underscored by a severely negative advance-decline ratio, signalling widespread selling pressure across the segment. Despite the overall slump, select stocks bucked the trend, highlighting a mixed performance within the mid-cap universe. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps 1.58% Amid Broad Market Weakness; Metal Sector Offers Rare Relief
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp correction on 30 March 2026, with the Sensex plunging over 1,000 points to close at 72,424.27, down 1.58%. Market breadth deteriorated significantly as selling pressure intensified across sectors, reflecting investor caution amid weak global cues and domestic headwinds. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Weakness as BSE 100 Declines 1.53%
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a notable downturn, declining by 1.53% on the day and registering a modest 0.11% fall over the past five days. This broad-based weakness was underscored by a lopsided advance-decline ratio, with only 8 stocks advancing against 92 decliners, signalling widespread selling pressure across heavyweight constituents. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Smallcap 250 Declines 2.13%
item.description: The small-cap segment, often a bellwether for risk appetite and emerging growth, has experienced a notable downturn with the BSE Smallcap 250 index declining by 2.13% on 30 March 2026. Despite pockets of resilience, the overall trend reflects widespread selling pressure, with sectoral disparities and a severely skewed advance-decline ratio underscoring the cautious stance of investors. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex Slumps 1.44% Amid Broad Market Weakness; Metals Sector Offers Limited Relief
item.description: The Indian equity market witnessed a sharp decline on 30 March 2026, with the Sensex falling 1.44% to trade at 72,520.15, retreating further from its 52-week low. Market breadth was notably weak, with a significant majority of stocks declining across sectors, while metals emerged as the lone bright spot amid widespread selling pressure. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, experienced a notable downturn on 30 March 2026, declining by 2.21%. Despite pockets of resilience, the overall trend reflected widespread selling pressure, with market breadth indicators signalling a pronounced imbalance between advancing and declining stocks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Sharp Decline as BSE MIDCAP 150 Drops 1.98%
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, experienced a notable downturn on 30 March 2026, declining by 1.98% as broad market pressures weighed heavily on investor sentiment. Despite the overall weakness, select stocks within the segment delivered contrasting performances, highlighting the uneven nature of the current market environment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Broad Weakness as BSE 100 Declines 1.44%
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, experienced a modest decline of 1.44% on 30 March 2026, continuing a subdued trend over the past week with a marginal 0.02% drop. Despite the overall weakness, select heavyweight stocks demonstrated resilience, highlighting a nuanced market environment where defensive sectors outperformed cyclical counterparts. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Uttam Sugar Mills Ltd is Rated Sell
item.description: Uttam Sugar Mills Ltd is rated Sell by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 31 December 2025. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock's current position as of 30 March 2026, providing investors with an up-to-date view of the company’s fundamentals, returns, and market performance. Time: 2 hours ago
